persona: CS lead, 12 mid-market accounts trending toward churn
prompt_to_designer: Outbound phone call from a friendly-looking number. Talk to the champion at each of these 12 accounts for 8-12 minutes. Push a risk-signal summary + transcript to Salesforce as a task on the account.
expected_outline_topics: what changed recently on their side
one thing that would rebuild trust

sample_answers.text: Honestly, we've been quiet because we've been busy re-evaluating. It's not you specifically, it's the category.
Our new VP came in and wants to consolidate the stack. Anything not-core is on the chopping block.
Renewal is in 90 days. Right now I'd say 40/60 against.
We're looking hard at [Competitor X] because their exec bundle includes what you charge extra for.
A named CSM who checks in monthly and a clearer roadmap for the reporting module.

expected_themes: trigger event is exec turnover, not product dissatisfaction
reporting module is the retention lever
unbundling vs. competitor's exec-bundle is a losing pricing position
renewal probability drops when CSM contact frequency < monthly
reactivation signal: they still take the call
